SUPERSEDED_NOTICE: This file used output size as a QUALITY PROXY, which we no longer rely on. The database no_squad completion here was previously 0.0 based on unpopulated placeholder files; all 10 tasks were re-run (100% completion) and correctness was re-graded with MARBLE's official recall metric using a single LLM extractor for ALL conditions. See database_correctness_regrade/ for the authoritative correctness numbers (Full Squad 40%, Coord-only 50%, Memory-only 0%, No-Squad 60%). Do not cite the quality_estimate fields in this file.
key_insight: Completion (did an answer appear) is NOT correctness. On the database domain, completion and correctness diverge: Squad reliably produced artifacts, but raw single-agent output had higher label recall in the n=10 regrade. See database_correctness_regrade/.
methodology: SUPERSEDED: output size was used as a quality proxy here. Authoritative correctness is the LLM-judge recall regrade in database_correctness_regrade/ (same extractor for all conditions).
